sections.content: Cross Country Ski Trail Conditions as of March 4, 2026 –

Our last day of skiing will be Sunday, March 8, 2026, weather and conditions permitting.  The trail will be groomed today for classic and skate skiing. The connector trail from the ski center to Bucks Run is no longer available.  Please know that you will have to walk to the start of the trail.  For your safety and the safety of our staff please adhere to Bucks Run hours.  Bucks Run is open Monday – Friday 12 pm – 7:45 pm and Saturday – Sunday 9 am – 7:45 pm, weather and conditions permitting.

Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Today , Monday , was a pinnacle day for Nubs Knob Nordic .  The  groomers have the packed base they have wished for.  And they are using it !  The temperature swings this week will provide a late AM sweet spot that should not be missed .

Huron Meadows Metropark (Brighton).conditions: Excellent again. Fresh groom/till this AM held up well…fast and hard. Probably another day left tomorrow since it will freeze again tonight.

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails were groomed and tracked on Monday morning. Conditions are very good.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Night Skiing is Tuesday thru Saturday from 5:30 to 9:00 p.m. Night skiing ends on March 14.
nubsNob.comments: It's another sunny start to the day with excellent skiing. Expect some firmer snow in the morning that will transition to soft snow by late morning. The firmest snow will be at Pintail Peak as this was groomed first last night. Sunshine and a spring like ski day should make for a fun day at Nub's Nob. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar and food service. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. with an hour break at 4:30. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
